title: pelargonium × unguiculatum
intro: Pelargonium × unguiculatum, also known as Cape Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to South Africa. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Cape Geranium include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in relieving cold and flu symptoms, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
